message:
fix(btree): allocate overflow pages at full page_size, not usable_size

Same class of bug as 3001f011 (B-tree pages) but for overflow chains.
When reserved_bytes > 0, overflow page buffers were allocated at
usable_size, producing undersized pages that stock SQLite rejects.

Changes:
- cursor.rs: write_overflow_chain_for_insert uses self.page_size
- overflow.rs: write_overflow_chain takes full_page_size parameter
- payload.rs: write_payload threads full_page_size through

All 247 btree tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
